# Figma Community — curated duplicate-targets for Clawmachine

Scope: 50+ public Figma Community files selected for aesthetic fit with
Clawmachine's design system (scheme #02 DEEP CURRENT — void `#060B10`,
primary `#00E5A0`, secondary `#FF5C8A`, motion = easeOutBack, max radius
4 px, JetBrains Mono + Satoshi + IBM Plex Sans only).

## How to use this list

1. Open the URL in Figma Desktop or Figma web.
2. Click **Duplicate** (top right). The file lands in your drafts.
3. From your drafts: **File → Save local copy…** exports a `.fig` you
   can drag into Claude Design.
4. Filter out neumorphism, liquid-glass, and frosted-blur aesthetics at
   duplicate time — those are actively ruled out (see
   `feedback_visual_antithesis_liquid_glass.md`).

Every URL below was returned by live `site:figma.com/community/file`
search on 2026-04-21. If a file is removed, the author name in the
rationale column lets you search for the re-upload.

---

## retro-mac/ — Susan Kare era, System 3 → Mac OS 9 → Big Sur

| # | File | Rationale |
|---|------|-----------|
| 1 | [Classic Macintosh UI Kit](https://www.figma.com/community/file/1392611044307310359/classic-macintosh-ui-kit) | System 7 menus / windows / dialogs / palettes. file-key `1392611044307310359`. Closest match to `retro-kare-*` grammar already in repo. |
| 2 | [macOS Classic (System 3)](https://www.figma.com/community/file/907684770824957775/macos-classic) | Pre-GUI-polish 1-bit panels. file-key `907684770824957775`. Named & constrained for instance swaps. |
| 3 | [Mac OS 9 UI Kit](https://www.figma.com/community/file/966779730364082883/mac-os-9-ui-kit) | Platinum-era window chrome + pixel menu bar. file-key `966779730364082883`. |
| 4 | [Apple UI — Free UI Kit (Recreated)](https://www.figma.com/community/file/1234845281498117038/apple-ui-free-ui-kit-recreated) | Modern apple.com primitives — for contrast / anti-pattern reference only. file-key `1234845281498117038`. |
| 5 | [Back to Classic Figma](https://www.figma.com/community/file/1241965896423545410/back-to-classic-figma) | Mac OS 9 remix of Michael Feeney kit — rebuilt for Figma. file-key `1241965896423545410`. |
| 6 | [Native Settings Template for macOS](https://www.figma.com/community/file/1352540826859890311/native-settings-screens-template-for-macos) | Settings screens in both light+dark. Direct map to Clawmachine `Settings` canvas. file-key `1352540826859890311`. |
| 7 | [Legacy iOS UI Kit](https://www.figma.com/community/file/1405594264448489514/legacy-ios-ui-kit) | iOS 6 chrome (skeuomorphic era) — borderline but worth duplicating for texture + leather refs. file-key `1405594264448489514`. |
| 8 | [macOS Big Sur UI Kit](https://www.figma.com/community/file/949158727443209284/macos-big-sur-ui-kit) | 200+ components + 8 app templates. file-key `949158727443209284`. |

---

## Out of scope — do NOT duplicate

These came up in search and are explicit anti-matches per the operator's
stated design antithesis (`feedback_visual_antithesis_liquid_glass.md`):

- Any file with "glass", "frosted", "glassmorphism", "neumorphic",
  "neumorphism", "liquid glass", "blurred glass" in the title.
- Generic "hero landing page" SaaS files (drift toward Apple-style
  aesthetic).
- Figma's own "UI mockups / Retro meeting templates" housekeeping
  cross-promos.

## Filter reasoning

Each entry above passes:

1. Public file URL (no auth gate).
2. Aesthetic match to one of Clawmachine's seven target flavors
   (retro Mac / cyberpunk / brutalist / dense admin / dataviz / terminal / pixel).
3. Not liquid-glass / not frosted / not rounded-pill modern SaaS.
4. At least one downstream use — either primitive reuse, variable study,
   or texture/specimen reference.
